'''Ranth''' [[Language/Legends|language]] was the native language of the [[Ranth]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Caaraz]]. It was mainly formed by purrs, growls and rude vocalizations. Ranth had an alphabetic [[Ranth alphabet|written form]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Ranths who were "civilized" spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
